summary: Iteration 1: Backend fully tested via pytest (12/12 passing). Frontend smoke-tested via Playwright: homepage, trust signals, featured courier cards (6), navigation to BusinessAuth, register form render all work. Courier login flow navigation appears broken (landed on /auth/business after submit instead of /courier/dashboard).

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking submit on /auth/courier, the page URL ended on /auth/business instead of redirecting to /courier/dashboard. Either /auth/courier route is missing/fallback-redirecting, or login success handler is wrong. Could not verify Leads/Rate Cards/Coverage tabs.

action_items: Investigate CourierAuth.jsx: verify route /auth/courier exists in App.js and login on success redirects to /courier/dashboard (check token persistence and useNavigate call).
Verify AdminAuth.jsx similarly - not fully verified in this iteration due to Playwright script aborting after courier failure.
All backend endpoints validated; no backend changes required.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 676 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, couriers, leads, courier_ops, admin) for maintainability.
Mock OTP returned in response is intentional per spec - flagged as MOCKED dependency.
GET /api/courier/coverage allows any authenticated user (no role check); minor - consider restricting to courier.
require_role helper defined but never actually used (dead code) - replaced with inline role checks in handlers.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@logimarket.in/admin@123; Courier: bluedartexpress@partner.in/partner@123; OTP: 123456 (also dev_otp in response).
seed_data_creation: Used seed: 6 couriers + ~250 rate cards. Created TEST_biz_* users via registration tests (cleanup not done).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py covers auth/search/leads/courier-ops/admin/freight. Re-run after main agent fixes CourierAuth/AdminAuth redirect. Then continue Playwright on courier dashboard (Leads/Rate Cards/Coverage tabs), admin dashboard (approvals/leads), and SearchResults page (blur vs unblur + LeadModal SLA timer). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://cargo-hub-134.preview.emergentagent.com
rca of the issue: Courier login submit ended on /auth/business: likely either CourierAuth component shares state with BusinessAuth incorrectly, or the route /auth/courier in App.js is misconfigured, or the success handler in CourierAuth calls navigate('/auth/business') by copy-paste mistake. Suggest main agent inspect CourierAuth.jsx success handler and App.js routes.
